mapper.sql: select id, attended_time, chief_duty_name, chief_duty_id, chief_duty_phone, combat_duty_name, combat_duty_id, combat_duty_phone, duty_offier_name, duty_offier_id, duty_offier_phone, confidential_name, confidential_id, confidential_phone, political_name, political_id, political_phone, guarantee_name, guarantee_id, guarantee_phone, messenger_name, messenger_id, messenger_phone, detachment_name, detachment_id, detachment_number, detachment_people_name, detachment_people_id, detachment_people_phone, zhibanqingkaung, bingliqingkuang from bdgl_teamduty
mapper.insert:
insert into bdgl_teamduty
id, attended_time, chief_duty_name, chief_duty_id, chief_duty_phone, combat_duty_name, combat_duty_id, combat_duty_phone, duty_offier_name, duty_offier_id, duty_offier_phone, confidential_name, confidential_id, confidential_phone, political_name, political_id, political_phone, guarantee_name, guarantee_id, guarantee_phone, messenger_name, messenger_id, messenger_phone, detachment_name, detachment_id, detachment_number, detachment_people_name, detachment_people_id, detachment_people_phone, zhibanqingkaung, bingliqingkuang,
#{id}, #{attendedTime}, #{chiefDutyName}, #{chiefDutyId}, #{chiefDutyPhone}, #{combatDutyName}, #{combatDutyId}, #{combatDutyPhone}, #{dutyOffierName}, #{dutyOffierId}, #{dutyOffierPhone}, #{confidentialName}, #{confidentialId}, #{confidentialPhone}, #{politicalName}, #{politicalId}, #{politicalPhone}, #{guaranteeName}, #{guaranteeId}, #{guaranteePhone}, #{messengerName}, #{messengerId}, #{messengerPhone}, #{detachmentName}, #{detachmentId}, #{detachmentNumber}, #{detachmentPeopleName}, #{detachmentPeopleId}, #{detachmentPeoplePhone}, #{zhibanqingkaung}, #{bingliqingkuang},
mapper.delete:
delete from bdgl_teamduty where id in
#{id}
mapper.select: SELECT political_name,detachment_people_phone FROM bdgl_teamduty WHERE attended_time >= #{starttime} AND attended_time <= #{endtime} AND detachment_id = #{unitid}

select attended_time, chief_duty_name, chief_duty_phone, combat_duty_name, combat_duty_phone, duty_offier_name, duty_offier_phone, confidential_name, confidential_phone, political_name, political_phone, guarantee_name, guarantee_phone, messenger_name, messenger_phone from bdgl_teamduty where attended_time like concat('%', #{date},'%')

select attended_time, chief_duty_name, chief_duty_phone, combat_duty_name, combat_duty_phone, duty_offier_name, duty_offier_phone, confidential_name, confidential_phone, political_name, political_phone, guarantee_name, guarantee_phone, messenger_name, messenger_phone from bdgl_teamduty where attended_time like concat('%', #{attendedTime},'%')
